summary: BC Integration Dashboard feature testing complete. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend UI test cases passed (100%). Dashboard correctly displays 4 summary cards, filters, search, and transactions table. Shows 0 transactions as expected (no BC records created in preview env). Both preflight regression endpoints (sales orders and purchase invoices) working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React framework artifact, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard endpoint correctly aggregates bc_sales_order and bc_purchase_invoice from hub_documents
Filtering by record_type and status works correctly
All data-testid attributes present for testing
4 summary cards display correct counts from API
Both preflight endpoints (sales orders and purchase invoices) working
